name: burt_network
desc: The shared Dart networking library.

name: dispose
desc: Closes the socket.

name: heartbeatInterval
desc: How often to check for heartbeats.

name: heartbeatTimer
desc: A timer to call checkHeartbeats every heartbeatInterval.

name: init
desc: Initializes the socket, and restarts it if a known "safe" error occurs (see allowedErrors).

name: Json
desc: JSON data as a map.

name: onData
desc: Override this function to process incoming data, along with the source address and port.

name: sendWrapper
desc: Sends an already-wrapped WrappedMessage to the destination, or the given destinationOverride.

name: checkHeartbeats
desc: Checks if a heartbeat has been received. If not, calls onDisconnect.

name: didReceivedHeartbeat
desc: Whether this socket received a heartbeat since the last call to checkHeartbeats.

name: heartbeatInterval
desc: How often to check for heartbeats.

name: onConnect
desc: Sets destination to the incoming source.

name: onDisconnect
desc: Sends a Disconnect message to the dashboard and sets destination to null.

name: onHeartbeat
desc: Handles incoming heartbeats.

name: onConnect
desc: Sets destination to the incoming source.

name: sendLog
desc: Sends a log message or saves it until a Dashboard is connected.

name: SocketInfo
desc: Information about a socket.

desc: The equality operator.

name: SocketInfo
desc: A const constructor.

name: address
desc: The IP address of this socket.

name: copyWith
desc: A copy of this configuration, to avoid modifying the original.

desc: Parses the socket data from a YAML map.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: port
desc: The port that the socket is connected to.

name: SocketInfo.raw
desc: Use this constructor to pass in a raw String for the address.

name: toJson
desc: This socket's configuration in JSON format.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: UdpSocket
desc: Manages a UDP socket.

name: UdpSocket
desc: Opens a UDP socket on the given port that can send and receive data.

name: allowedErrors
desc: A collection of allowed OSError codes.

desc: Closes the socket.

name: init
desc: Initializes the socket, and restarts it if a known "safe" error occurs (see allowedErrors).

name: onData
desc: Override this function to process incoming data, along with the source address and port.

name: port
desc: The port this socket is listening on. See RawDatagramSocket.bind.

name: quiet
desc: Whether to silence "normal" output, like opening/closing and resetting sockets.

name: sendData
desc: Sends data to the given destination.

name: generated
desc: This library exports the generated Protobuf classes.

desc:

name: gripperLift
desc:
Needed for IK: If the wrist-lift moves, we need to re-calculate IK to keep the end-effector
stationary. See /Arm/src/ik/README.md in the Arm-Firmware repository.

name: RoverStatus
desc:
/ Changes the way the rover listens to incoming commands.
/
/ - When IDLE, all subsystems will ignore all commands
/ - When MANUAL, all subsystems will accept all commands
/ - When AUTONOMOUS, the rover will ignore commands from the dashboard

name: Timestamp
desc:
A Timestamp represents a point in time independent of any time zone or local
calendar, encoded as a count of seconds and fractions of seconds at
nanosecond resolution. The count is relative to an epoch at UTC midnight on
January 1, 1970, in the proleptic Gregorian calendar which extends the
Gregorian calendar backwards to year one.

name: clone
desc:
Creates a deep copy of the fields in this message.
(The generated code uses mergeFromMessage.)

name: copyWith
desc: Apply updates to a copy of this message.

name: createEmptyInstance
desc: Creates an empty instance of the same message type as this.

name: fromDateTime
desc: Creates a new instance from dateTime.

name: nanos
desc:
Non-negative fractions of a second at nanosecond resolution. Negative
second values with fractions must still have non-negative nanos values
that count forward in time. Must be from 0 to 999,999,999
inclusive.

name: seconds
desc:
Represents seconds of UTC time since Unix epoch
1970-01-01T00:00:00Z. Must be from 0001-01-01T00:00:00Z to
9999-12-31T23:59:59Z inclusive.

name: toDateTime
desc: Converts an instance to DateTime.

name: UpdateSetting
